name: Tychee Research Group (Turion Space)
summary: Tychee Research Group (El Segundo, CA; founded 2018; founder Rob Brady; acquired by Turion Space Jan 2026) — Warhacker approved problem: fragmented, air-gapped satellite ground software needing reusable deployment stacks.
killinchu_fit: Tychee's problem statement is exactly what SZL's uds-mesh pointer-manifest pattern solves — Tychee is publicly asking for the artifact SZL has already shipped (mission P4 composition).
hooks: uds-mesh pointer-manifest composition of 4 ground-software components (mission P4)
OTEL span set an operator can chain-verify
